metadata.source: CLUTRR v1 (Sinha et al., EMNLP 2019, arXiv:1908.06177). Pre-generated TEST splits of configs gen_train234_test2to10 and gen_train23_test2to10, staged in temp/datasets/ from the kliang5/CLUTRR_huggingf...
metadata.title: CLUTRR Crisp-Gold Calibration Anchor: Atomic + Multi-Hop Kinship Triples with k-Difficulty Splits
metadata.selection_rationale: CLUTRR is rule-based/templated so its kinship gold is exact (no annotation noise) — the property that lets it host the FDR calibration diagonal; proof_state yields crisp ATOMIC (directly-stated) + MUL...
metadata.row_is_example: Each CLUTRR story is one example; 190 stories -> 190 examples.
metadata.schema_note: input/output are JSON-serialized strings (parse with json.loads). input keys: doc_id, document_text (brackets stripped), document_text_bracketed, entities[{name,gender,type,node_index}], query{head,ta...
metadata.example_ordering: round-robin across k (order [2, 10, 6, 3, 9, 7, 4, 8, 5]) so mini/preview span short and long chains
metadata.filtering: Restricted to canonical CLUTRR simple-path chains: distinct entities==k+1, distinct story edges==k, |atomic|==k, |multi_hop|==k-1, exactly one proof root equal to the query target, and a genders-order...
metadata.out_of_scope: No decoy/entrapment generation, no LLM scoring, no FDR/precision/recall, no Prolog execution, no transitive-closure enrichment — those belong to the experiment artifact.
